title: T-109 — Migration History screen (SET-064 §9.7)
prompt:
# T-109 — Migration History screen (SET-064 §9.7)

PRD: docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §9.7 (L2 UI surfaces)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build SET-064 Migration History — `tenant_migrations` audit trail viewer (read-only). Distinct from SET-063 Promotions (T-070), which is the operational orchestration screen with Active/History tabs scoped to in-flight + recent rollouts. SET-064 is the full historical list with filters across all statuses + ability to drill into per-row diff snapshot.

## Implementation contract
1. Page at apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/tenant/migrations/page.tsx (Server Component) reads `tenant_migrations` for caller's org_id, paginated.
2. List columns: started_at, completed_at, migration_type (canary/promote/rollback), status, initiated_by_user, source_version, target_version.
3. Toolbar: status filter, type filter, date range filter, search by user.
4. Each row has 'View snapshot' link opening read-only modal with stored before/after snapshot JSON (no diff diff render — just two collapsible JSON panes).
5. RBAC: requires `settings.audit.read` (re-uses audit perm from T-001).

## Files
- apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/tenant/migrations/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/tenant/migrations/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` array.

## Test strategy
1. RED: RTL test seeds 5 tenant_migrations rows across status/type; assert filters narrow rows + RBAC 403 when missing perm.
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/tenant/migrations/page.test.tsx`
2. RED must fail.
3. GREEN: implement Server Component + filters + snapshot modal.
4. Re-run RED + `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate SET-063 promotion controls (T-070); this is read-only history.
- Do not bypass withOrgContext on tenant_migrations queries.
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (§0).

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. PRD: docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md v3.5.

## Prototype reference
**Source:** `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/admin-screens.jsx:630-688`
**Label:** `promotions_screen`
**Component type:** page-layout

> **No exact prototype** — closest visual pattern: `promotions_screen` at `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/admin-screens.jsx:630-688`. Build in the same structural style as this screen. Re-use the Promotions screen's Active/History tabs + table pattern (shadcn Tabs + Table). This screen shows the full historical migration list — drop the Active tab and keep one history table with the same filter toolbar density.

### Parity requirements (mandatory ACs)
The production implementation MUST match the prototype on three dimensions — add these as explicit ACs:
1. **Structural parity** — same sections, same field labels, same shadcn primitives invoked, same modals triggered from same actions.
2. **Visual parity** — same density tokens, same shadcn/Radix primitives (no drift to plain HTML), same layout proportions.
3. **Interaction parity** — same enable/disable rules, same loading/empty/error states, same keyboard focus order.

### Translation notes (from prototype-labels index)
- window.SETTINGS_PROMOTIONS + window.SETTINGS_PROMOTION_STAGES → Drizzle queries on promotions and promotion_stages tables
- Active vs history tab → shadcn Tabs with URL search param ?tab=active|history for RSC
- Stage info cards (TierBadge grid) → shadcn Card grid; data from promotion_stages table
- StatusPill component → shadcn Badge with variant mapping from promotion status enum
- 'View diff' button → opens PromoteToL2Modal (SM-05) with promotion record prefilled
- 'Start promotion' button → opens PromoteToL2Modal (SM-05) in create mode
- Add RBAC guard — only Admin role can view and start promotions
- Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys

### shadcn primitives to use
`Tabs`, `Table`, `Card`, `Badge`, `Button`

pipeline_inputs.description: Migration History (SET-064) — full read-only audit list of tenant_migrations rows with filters and per-row snapshot viewer.
pipeline_inputs.details:
PRD §9.7 SET-064: `tenant_migrations audit`. Distinct from SET-063 (T-070) which mixes Active orchestration controls with a History tab; this screen is purely historical with full filter set. Snapshot modal shows raw before/after JSON only — diff visualization is OUT OF SCOPE (could be later enhancement re-using SET-042 helper from T-108).

Additional acceptance detail preserved from compressed AC list:
- Given the caller lacks `settings.audit.read`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.
- UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
out_of_scope: Active orchestration controls (covered by SET-063 / T-070)
Inline diff render (defer to future enhancement)
acceptance_criteria: Given 5 tenant_migrations rows exist (mix of statuses canary/completed/rolled_back), when the page renders, then all 5 rows are listed with started_at, status, type, initiated_by_user columns populated.
Given the user filters status='rolled_back' and date range 'last 30 days', when the list re-renders, then only rolled_back rows within that window are visible.
Given the user clicks 'View snapshot' on a row, when the modal opens, then two collapsible JSON panes (before/after) render the stored snapshot exactly.

Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect the task evidence, then these additional requirements are proven together: Given the caller lacks `settings.audit.read`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.; UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: RTL test seeds rows + asserts filters + snapshot modal renders + RBAC 403.
GREEN: implement Server Component + filters + modal.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not duplicate SET-063 promotion controls (T-070); this is read-only history.
Do not bypass withOrgContext on tenant_migrations queries.
pipeline_inputs.prototype_index_entry: audit_log_full_screen (closest pattern — filterable audit list; SET-064 is tenant_migrations not org audit)
